rootCause.description: Dev server started before schema migration (20260608000000_add_worktime_config). Prisma Client singleton (globalThis.prisma) cached old instance without workTimeConfig/timeSlotDefinition delegates.
evidence: Prisma Client types include workTimeConfig (164 refs) and timeSlotDefinition (24 refs)
node direct call to new PrismaClient().workTimeConfig.findMany() succeeds
Service code uses correct delegate names (prisma.workTimeConfig, tx.timeSlotDefinition)
Dev server PID 26648 was running since before migration

fix.action: restart dev server (no code change needed)
fix.prismaClientStatus: correctly generated with workTimeConfig and timeSlotDefinition delegates

manualValidationSteps: 重启 dev server: npm run dev
点击 节次与作息设置
确认不再显示 Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'findMany')
确认 resolved card 正常
确认 config list 正常
确认 slot table 正常
确认学期设置和排课参数设置仍能切换

userManualValidation.note: 用户重启 dev server 后人工验证通过
